---
title: "Excalidraw"
---

Hand-drawn diagrams from `.excalidraw` scene files (@fig-arch,
@fig-flow). The scene is a JSON document describing every stroke, shape,
and label — which is exactly what makes it work here: it diffs cleanly
in pull requests, merges like any other source file, and can be edited
by anyone at [excalidraw.com](https://excalidraw.com/) or in the VS Code
extension without any export step afterward. The hand-drawn Virgil
lettering and rough strokes are reproduced faithfully because rendering
uses Excalidraw's own export code, with fonts embedded in the output.
Click any figure to zoom.

![Architecture sketch](figures/arch.excalidraw){#fig-arch width=60%}

[view source: `arch.excalidraw`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/site/gallery/figures/arch.excalidraw){.source-link}

![Flow with its scene background](figures/flow.excalidraw){#fig-flow background=scene}

[view source: `flow.excalidraw`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/site/gallery/figures/flow.excalidraw){.source-link}
